DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS AGURTO CORPORATION AND LUIS AGURTO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. Plaintiff has stated that she will file a first amended complaint prior to the hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
